'''yarate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:windwards|windwards]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-r-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:windwards|windwards]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| yarate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:yarate|yarate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yaratesher|yaratesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaratesherĂ«m|yaratesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaratero|yaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yarateshĂ«|yarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yarateshĂ«m|yarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaratero|gokiyaratero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyarateshĂ«|gokiyarateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyarateshĂ«m|gokiyarateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyarankerom|goyarankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyarankeshĂ«|goyarankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyarankeshĂ«m|goyarankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyarankeya|goyarankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yaraterom|yaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yaratemu|yaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yarateya|yarateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyaraterom|gokiyaraterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyaratemu|gokiyaratemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyarateya|gokiyarateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:yararate|yararate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yararatesher|yararatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yararatesherĂ«m|yararatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yararatero|yararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yararateshĂ«|yararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yararateshĂ«m|yararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyararatero|gokiyararatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyararateshĂ«|gokiyararateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyararateshĂ«m|gokiyararateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyararankerom|goyararankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyararankeshĂ«|goyararankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyararankeshĂ«m|goyararankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyararankeya|goyararankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yararaterom|yararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yararatemu|yararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yararateya|yararateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyararaterom|gokiyararaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyararatemu|gokiyararatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyararateya|gokiyararateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠte|yĂŠrĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠtesher|yĂŠrĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m|yĂŠrĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠtero|yĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|yĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|yĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠtero|gokiyĂŠrĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«|gokiyĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m|gokiyĂŠrĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyĂŠrĂŠnkerom|goyĂŠrĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«|goyĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m|goyĂŠrĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-

|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠterom|yĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠtemu|yĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yĂŠrĂŠteya|yĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠterom|gokiyĂŠrĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠtemu|gokiyĂŠrĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyĂŠrĂŠteya|gokiyĂŠrĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:yafrafte|yafrafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:yafraftesher|yafraftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafraftesherĂ«m|yafraftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafraftero|yafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yafrafteshĂ«|yafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafrafteshĂ«m|yafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafraftero|gokiyafraftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyafrafteshĂ«|gokiyafrafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafrafteshĂ«m|gokiyafrafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goyafrafnkerom|goyafrafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyafrafnkeshĂ«|goyafrafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyafrafnkeshĂ«m|goyafrafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goyafrafnkeya|goyafrafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:yafrafterom|yafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yafraftemu|yafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:yafrafteya|yafrafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiyafrafterom|gokiyafrafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyafraftemu|gokiyafraftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiyafrafteya|gokiyafrafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
